_.bad_password: Password no nteɛ. Yɛsrɛ wo, sɔ hwɛ bio.
_.discard_changes_explain: Wowɔ nsakraeɛ a wonkoraeɛ. So ampa sɛ wopɛ sɛ wotow gu na wofiri screen no so?
_.storage_is_encrypted: Wo koraeɛ no wɔakyekyere mu. Ɛhia password ansa na wɔabue mu.
_.change_input_currency: Sesa sika a wode hyɛ mu
_.qr_custom_input_button: Mia no mpɛn du (10) na wode wʼankasa input ahyɛ mu

azteco.errorBeforeRefeem: Ansa na woagye no, ɛsɛ sɛ wodi kan de Bitcoin sika kotokuo ka ho.
azteco.errorSomething: Biribi ankɔ yie. So voucher yi da so wɔ mu?
azteco.successMessage: Wɔagye voucher no yie! Wo sika no bɛduru wo Bitcoin sika kotokuo mu wɔ bere tiawa mu.
azteco.title: Gye Azte.co voucher

lnd.expiresIn: Ne bere bɛsa wɔ simma {time} mu
lnd.refill_create: Sɛnea wobɛkɔ wʼanim no, yɛsrɛ wo bɔ Bitcoin sika kotokuo a wode bɛsan ahyɛ ma.
lnd.refill_external: Fa sika kotokuo a ɛwɔ abɔnten san hyɛ ma
lnd.refill_lnd_balance: San hyɛ Lightning sika kotokuo mu sika ma
lnd.sameWalletAsInvoiceError: Worentumi mfa sika kotokuo a wode yɛɛ ka krataa no ara ntua ka krataa no.
lnd.title: Hwɛ sika no so

lndViewInvoice.additional_info: Nsɛm foforɔ a wɔde ka ho
lndViewInvoice.please_pay_between_and: Yɛsrɛ wo tua deɛ ɛwɔ {min} ne {max} ntam
lndViewInvoice.wasnt_paid_and_expired: Wɔantua ka krataa yi na ne bere nso asa.
lndViewInvoice.refund_deferred: Wɔntumi nsan mfa sika no mma ɛnnɛ. Sɔ hwɛ bio bere a swap timelock no bere asa no.
lndViewInvoice.notification_claim_body: {walletLabel}: mia na gye wo Lightning akatua a ɛreba no.
lndViewInvoice.notification_refund_body: {walletLabel}: mia na san fa wo Lightning akatua a asɛn no ma.

plausibledeniability.create_password_explanation: Ɛnsɛ sɛ password a wode ma koraeɛ a ɛyɛ atoroɔ no yɛ pɛ sɛ password a wode ma wo koraeɛ kɛseɛ no.
plausibledeniability.help: Tebea bi mu no, wobetumi ahyɛ wo sɛ kyerɛ password. Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wo sika no nya banbɔ a, BlueWallet betumi ayɛ koraeɛ foforɔ a wɔakyekyere mu a ɛwɔ password soronko. Sɛ wɔhyɛ wo a, wobetumi akyerɛ obi password yi. Sɛ wode hyɛ BlueWallet mu a, ɛbɛbue koraeɛ “atoroɔ” foforɔ. Ɛbɛyɛ sɛnea ɛyɛ nokware ma onipa no, nanso ɛbɛkora wo koraeɛ kɛseɛ a wo sika wɔ mu no so kokoam.
plausibledeniability.help2: Koraeɛ foforɔ no bɛyɛ adwuma yie, na wobetumi de sika kakraa bi asie hɔ sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ sɛnea wobetumi agye adi.
plausibledeniability.password_should_not_match: Wɔde password no redi dwuma seesei. Yɛsrɛ wo, sɔ password foforɔ hwɛ.
plausibledeniability.title: Plausible Deniability

pleasebackup.ask: Woasie wo sika kotokuo no backup nsɛmfua no anaa? Wɔhia backup nsɛmfua yi ansa na woatumi anya wo sika no sɛ ɛba sɛ wo afidie yi yera a. Sɛ backup nsɛmfua no nni hɔ a, wo sika no bɛyera koraa.
pleasebackup.text:
Yɛsrɛ wo gye bere kakra twerɛ saa nkaeɛ nsɛmfua yi gu krataa bi so.
Ɛyɛ wo backup na wobetumi de asan anya sika kotokuo no.
pleasebackup.text_lnd: Yɛsrɛ wo sie saa sika kotokuo backup yi. Ɛma wotumi san nya sika kotokuo no sɛ ɛyera a.
pleasebackup.title: Wɔayɛ wo sika kotokuo no.

receive.address_not_found: Wɔantumi anya address a wode begye.
receive.maxSats: Dodoɔ a ɛsoɔ paa ne satoshi {max}
receive.maxSatsFull: Dodoɔ a ɛsoɔ paa ne satoshi {max} anaa {currency}
receive.minSats: Dodoɔ a ɛsua koraa ne satoshi {min}
receive.minSatsFull: Dodoɔ a ɛsua koraa ne satoshi {min} anaa {currency}
receive.bip47_explanation: Akatua koodu yɛ address a ɛwɔ baabiara a ɛmma wo sika kotokuo address ho nna adi. Ɛnyɛ adwumayɛbea nyinaa na ɛbɛgye atom.

send.provided_address_is_invoice: Ɛyɛ sɛ address yi yɛ Lightning ka krataa. Yɛsrɛ wo, kɔ wo Lightning sika kotokuo mu na tua ka krataa yi ho ka.
send.create_copy: Kopi na bɔ dawuro akyire yi
send.create_this_is_hex: Yei ne wo nsesaeɛ hex—wɔahyɛ ne nsa ase na ayɛ krado sɛ wɔbɛbɔ dawuro akɔ network no so.
send.details_add_rec_add: Fa Onipa a Ɔbɛgye Ka Ho
send.details_add_rec_rem: Yi Onipa a Ɔbɛgye Firi Mu
send.details_add_recc_rem_all_alert_descripti: So ampa sɛ wopɛ sɛ woyi wɔn a wɔbɛgye nyinaa firi mu?
send.details_add_rec_rem_all: Yi Wɔn a Wɔbɛgye Nyinaa Firi Mu
send.please_complete_recipient_details: Yɛsrɛ wo, wie ɔdegyeni #{number} ho nsɛm ansa na wode ɔdegyeni foforɔ aka ho.
send.details_adv_full: Fa Sika a Aka Nyinaa Di Dwuma
send.details_adv_full_sure: So ampa sɛ wopɛ sɛ wode wo sika kotokuo mu sika a aka nyinaa yɛ saa nsesaeɛ yi?
send.details_adv_full_sure_frozen: So ampa sɛ wopɛ sɛ wode wo sika kotokuo mu sika a aka nyinaa yɛ saa nsesaeɛ yi? Yɛsrɛ wo hyɛ no nsow sɛ wɔnnka sika a wɔakyekyere no ho.
send.details_amount_field_is_less_than_minimu: Dodoɔ a woahyɛ no sua dodo. Yɛsrɛ wo, hyɛ dodoɔ a ɛboro satoshi 500 so.
send.details_error_decode: Wɔantumi ankyerɛ Bitcoin address no aseɛ
send.details_no_signed_tx: File a woapaw no nni nsesaeɛ a wobetumi de aba mu.
send.details_note_placeholder: Nkaeɛ a wode ma wo ho
send.details_scan_hint: Mia mprɛnu na scan anaa fa baabi a ɛrekɔ ba mu
send.details_total_exceeds_balance: Sika a worepɛ sɛ wode soma no boro sika a aka no so.
send.details_total_exceeds_balance_frozen: Sika a worepɛ sɛ wode soma no boro sika a aka no so. Yɛsrɛ wo hyɛ no nsow sɛ wɔnnka sika a wɔakyekyere no ho.
send.details_wallet_before_tx: Ansa na woayɛ nsesaeɛ no, ɛsɛ sɛ wodi kan de Bitcoin sika kotokuo ka ho.
send.fee_replace_minvb: Ka no nyinaa (satoshi biara wɔ vByte mu) a wopɛ sɛ wotua no ɛsɛ sɛ ɛboro sat/vByte {min} so.
send.permission_camera_message: Yɛhia wo kwan ansa na yɛde wo camera adi dwuma.
send.invalid_psbt: Wɔde PSBT a nyɛ papa amaa.
send.psbt_this_is_psbt: Yei yɛ Partially Signed Bitcoin Transaction (PSBT). Yɛsrɛ wo, fa wo hardware sika kotokuo wie ne nsa ase hyɛ.
send.no_tx_signing_in_progress: Nsesaeɛ biara nni hɔ a wɔrehyɛ ne nsa ase.
send.outdated_rate: Bere a wɔsesaa boɔ no a etwa toɔ ne: {date}
send.psbt_tx_open: Bue Nsesaeɛ a Wɔahyɛ Ne Nsa Ase
send.psbt_tx_scan: Scan Nsesaeɛ a Wɔahyɛ Ne Nsa Ase
send.qr_error_no_qrcode: Yɛantumi anhunu QR Koodu papa biara wɔ mfonini a woapaw no mu. Hwɛ hu sɛ QR Koodu nko ara na ɛwɔ mfonini no mu na biribi foforɔ te sɛ nsɛm anaa bɔtɔn nni mu.
send.reset_amount_confirm: Wopɛ sɛ wosan yɛ dodoɔ no foforɔ anaa?
send.cant_send_to_silentpayment_adress: Saa sika kotokuo yi ntumi nsoma nkɔ SilentPayment address mu
send.cant_send_to_bip47: Saa sika kotokuo yi ntumi nsoma nkɔ BIP47 akatua koodu mu
send.cant_find_bip47_notification: Di kan fa saa Akatua Koodu yi ka contacts ho

settings.about_backup: Yɛ wo safoa no backup bere biara!
settings.about_free: BlueWallet yɛ adwuma a ɛyɛ kwa na ɛyɛ open-source. Bitcoin adefoɔ na wɔyɛeɛ.
settings.block_explorer_invalid_custom_url: URL a wɔde maa no nyɛ papa. Yɛsrɛ wo, hyɛ URL papa a ɛfiri http:// anaa https:// ase.
settings.about_selftest_electrum_disabled: Self-testing nni hɔ wɔ Electrum Offline Mode mu. Yɛsrɛ wo, dum offline mode no na sɔ hwɛ bio.
settings.about_selftest_ok: Mu nsɔhwɛ nyinaa adi nkonim yie. Sika kotokuo no yɛ adwuma yie.
settings.privacy_temporary_screenshots_instructio: Wɔbɛdum screen capture banbɔ no berɛ tiawa, na ama screenshot ne screen recording ho kwan. Banbɔ no bɛsan ahyɛ ase ankasa bere a woto BlueWallet mu na wosan bue no.
settings.biometrics_no_longer_available: Wo afidie nhyehyɛeɛ asesa na ɛne banbɔ nhyehyɛeɛ a woapaw wɔ app no mu no nhyia bio. Yɛsrɛ wo, san ma biometrics anaa passcode kwan, na san hyɛ app no ase sɛnea nsakraeɛ yi bɛyɛ adwuma.
settings.biom_10times: Woabɔ mmɔden sɛ wobɛhyɛ wo password mpɛn du (10). Wopɛ sɛ wosan yɛ wo koraeɛ no foforɔ anaa? Yei bɛyi sika kotokuo nyinaa afiri hɔ na abue wo koraeɛ no mu.
settings.biom_conf_identity: Yɛsrɛ wo, si onipa a woyɛ no so dua.
settings.biom_no_passcode: Wo afidie no nni passcode anaa biometrics a ɛyɛ adwuma. Sɛnea wobɛkɔ wʼanim no, yɛsrɛ wo yɛ passcode anaa biometric wɔ Nhyehyɛeɛ app no mu.
settings.biom_remove_decrypt: Wɔbɛyi wo sika kotokuo nyinaa afiri hɔ na wɔabue wo koraeɛ no mu. So ampa sɛ wopɛ sɛ wokɔ wʼanim?
settings.currency_source: Baabi a wonya boɔ no firi
settings.currency_fetch_error: Mfomsoɔ bi baa bere a wɔrenya sika a woapaw no boɔ no.
settings.donate_description: Boa yɛn ma Blue nkɔ so nyɛ kwa!
settings.electrum_error_connect: Wɔntumi nkahyɛ Electrum server a wɔde maa no mu
settings.electrum_error_connect_tor: Wɔntumi nkahyɛ Electrum server a wɔde maa no mu. Yɛsrɛ wo, hwɛ hu sɛ wɔakahyɛ Orbot app no mu na sɔ hwɛ bio.
settings.electrum_offline_description: Sɛ woma kwan a, wo Bitcoin sika kotokuo rensɔ nhwɛ sika a aka anaa nsesaeɛ.
settings.electrum_saved: Wɔasie wo nsakraeɛ no yie. Ebia ɛhia sɛ wosan hyɛ BlueWallet ase ansa na nsakraeɛ no ayɛ adwuma.
settings.set_electrum_server_as_default: Yɛ {server} sɛ Electrum server a wɔde di dwuma daa?
settings.set_lndhub_as_default: Yɛ {url} sɛ LNDhub server a wɔde di dwuma daa?
settings.electrum_preferred_server_description: Hyɛ server a wopɛ sɛ wo sika kotokuo de yɛ Bitcoin nnwuma nyinaa. Sɛ woyɛ wie a, wo sika kotokuo de saa server yi nko ara na ɛbɛhwɛ sika a aka, asoma nsesaeɛ, na anya network nsɛm. Hwɛ hu sɛ wogye saa server yi di ansa na woayɛ.
settings.electrum_reset_to_default: Yei bɛma BlueWallet apaw server bi kwa afiri server list no mu.
settings.electrum_reset: San yɛ no sɛnea ɛte daa
settings.electrum_reset_to_default_and_clear_hist: San yɛ no sɛnea ɛte daa na yi abakɔsɛm firi hɔ
settings.encrypt_decrypt_q: So ampa sɛ wopɛ sɛ wobue wo koraeɛ no mu? Yei bɛma wɔatumi anya wo sika kotokuo a password nni hɔ.
settings.encrypt_storage_explanation_description_: Sɛ woma Koraeɛ Kyekyere kwan a, ɛde banbɔ foforɔ ka wo app no ho denam ɔkwan a wɔfa so kora wo nsɛm wɔ wo afidie so no banbɔ so. Yei ma ɛyɛ den ma obiara sɛ ɔbɛnya wo nsɛm a ɔnni kwan.
Nanso, ɛho hia sɛ wuhu sɛ saa nkyekyeremu yi bɔ ɔkwan a wɔfa so nya wo sika kotokuo a ɛwɔ afidie no keychain mu no nko ara ho ban. Ɛmfa password anaa banbɔ foforɔ biara nto sika kotokuo no ankasa so.
settings.block_explorer_preferred: Fa block explorer a wopɛ di dwuma
settings.block_explorer_error_saving_custom: Mfomsoɔ wɔ block explorer a wopɛ no a wɔresie ho
settings.set_as_preferred_electrum: Sɛ woyɛ {host}:{port} sɛ server a wopɛ a, ɛbɛdum kwan a wɔde kahyɛ server a wɔakamfo kyerɛ kwa mu no.
settings.encrypted_feature_disabled: Wɔntumi mfa saa adeyɛ yi nni dwuma bere a koraeɛ a wɔakyekyere mu wɔ hɔ.
settings.encrypt_use_expl: Wɔde {type} bɛsi onipa a woyɛ no so dua ansa na woayɛ nsesaeɛ, abue, afa adi, anaa apepa sika kotokuo.
settings.biometrics_fail: Sɛ {type} nni hɔ, anaa ɛantumi ammue a, wobetumi de wo afidie passcode adi dwuma.
settings.general_continuity_e: Sɛ woma kwan a, wobetumi ahwɛ sika kotokuo a woapaw, ne nsesaeɛ, denam wo Apple iCloud afidie afoforɔ a wɔakahyɛ mu so.
settings.last_updated: Bere a Etwa Toɔ a Wɔsesaeɛ
settings.language_isRTL: Ɛhia sɛ wosan hyɛ BlueWallet ase ansa na kasa no kwan akyerɛ ayɛ adwuma.
settings.lightning_error_lndhub_uri_tor: LNDhub URI a nyɛ papa. Yɛsrɛ wo, hwɛ hu sɛ wɔakahyɛ Orbot app no mu na sɔ hwɛ bio.
settings.lightning_settings_explain: Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wokahyɛ wʼankasa LND node mu a, yɛsrɛ wo fa LNDhub si na fa ne URL gu nhyehyɛeɛ ha. Yɛsrɛ wo hyɛ no nsow sɛ sika kotokuo a wɔyɛ wɔ nsakraeɛ no akyi nko ara na ɛbɛkahyɛ LNDhub a woahyɛ no mu.
settings.electrum_suggested_description: Sɛ server a wopɛ nni hɔ a, wɔbɛpaw server a wɔakamfo kyerɛ kwa na wɔde adi dwuma.
settings.open_link_in_explorer: Bue link no wɔ explorer mu
settings.password_explain: Hyɛ password a wode bɛbue wo koraeɛ no.
settings.privacy_quickactions_explanation: Sɔ BlueWallet app icon no mu na ntɛm ara wobɛhwɛ wo sika kotokuo mu sika a aka.
settings.privacy_clipboard_explanation: Ma akwankyerɛ sɛ wohunu address anaa ka krataa wɔ wo clipboard mu a.
settings.privacy_do_not_track_explanation: Wɔremfa performance ne deɛ wobetumi de ahyɛ ho den ho nsɛm mma sɛ wɔbɛhwɛ mu.
settings.push_notifications_explanation:
Sɛ woma amaneɛbɔ kwan a, wɔde wo afidie token bɛkɔ server no so, na sika kotokuo address ne nsesaeɛ ID a ɛfa sika kotokuo ne nsesaeɛ nyinaa a woyɛɛ wɔ bere a woma amaneɛbɔ kwan no akyi nso bɛka ho. Wɔde afidie token no soma amaneɛbɔ, na sika kotokuo nsɛm no ma yɛtumi bɔ wo amaneɛ fa Bitcoin a ɛreba anaa nsesaeɛ a wɔasi so dua ho.

Nsɛm a ɛfiri bere a woma amaneɛbɔ kwan no akyi nko ara na wɔsoma—wɔmmoaboa biribiara a ɛdii kan no ano.

Sɛ wodum amaneɛbɔ a, ɛbɛyi saa nsɛm yi nyinaa afiri server no so. Bio nso, sɛ wopepa sika kotokuo firi app no mu a, ɛbɛyi nsɛm a ɛfa ho no nso afiri server no so.
settings.success_transaction_broadcasted: Wɔabɔ wo nsesaeɛ no dawuro yie!
settings.total_balance_explanation: Kyerɛ sika a aka wɔ wo sika kotokuo nyinaa mu wɔ wo fie screen widgets no so.

notifications.would_you_like_to_receive_notifications: Wopɛ sɛ wonya amaneɛbɔ bere a wonya akatua a ɛreba a?
notifications.notifications_subtitle: Akatua a ɛreba ne nsesaeɛ a wɔasi so dua
notifications.permission_denied_message: Woankyerɛ kwan sɛ wɔnsoma wo amaneɛbɔ. Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wonya amaneɛbɔ a, yɛsrɛ wo, ma wɔn kwan wɔ wo afidie nhyehyɛeɛ mu.

transactions.cancel_explain: Yɛde nsesaeɛ a ɛtua wo ka na ka no soɔ bɛsi nsesaeɛ yi anan mu. Yei twa nsesaeɛ a ɛwɔ hɔ seesei no mu. Wɔfrɛ yei RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.transaction_loading_error: Ɔhaw bi baa nsesaeɛ no a wɔreload ho. Yɛsrɛ wo, sɔ hwɛ bio akyire yi.
transactions.cpfp_exp: Yɛbɛyɛ nsesaeɛ foforɔ a ɛbɛsɛe wo nsesaeɛ a wɔnnsii so dua no. Ka no nyinaa bɛboro nsesaeɛ a ɛdii kan no ka so, enti ɛbɛyɛ ntɛm sɛ wɔ bɛmine. Wɔfrɛ yei CPFP—Child Pays for Parent.
transactions.cpfp_no_bump: Wɔntumi mma saa nsesaeɛ yi ka so.
transactions.enable_offline_signing: Wɔmfa saa sika kotokuo yi nni dwuma nka offline signing ho. Wopɛ sɛ woma kwan seesei anaa?
transactions.open_url_error: Wɔantumi ammue link no wɔ browser a wɔde di dwuma daa no mu. Yɛsrɛ wo, sesa wo browser a wode di dwuma daa no na sɔ hwɛ bio.
transactions.rbf_explain: Yɛde nsesaeɛ a ne ka soɔ bɛsi nsesaeɛ yi anan mu sɛnea wɔbɛmine no ntɛm. Wɔfrɛ yei RBF—Replace by Fee.
transactions.watchOnlyWarningDescription: Hwɛ wo ho yie wɔ asisifoɔ a wɔtaa de “watch-only” sika kotokuo daadaa nkurɔfoɔ no ho. Saa sika kotokuo yi mma wo kwan sɛ wobɛhwɛ sika so anaa wobɛsoma; ɛma wo kwan sɛ wobɛhwɛ sika a aka no nko ara.
transactions.custom_fee_warning_description: Ka a ɛwɔ 1 sat/vB ase yɛ papa, nanso ebia wɔremfa nkɔ esiane node nhyehyɛeɛ nti.

wallets.add_bitcoin_explain: Bitcoin sika kotokuo a ɛnyɛ den na ɛwɔ tumi
wallets.add_entropy_reset_message: Sɛ wosesa sika kotokuo no su a, ɛbɛsan ayɛ entropy a ɛwɔ hɔ seesei no foforɔ. Wopɛ sɛ wokɔ wʼanim anaa?
wallets.add_entropy_remain: entropy a wɔayɛ bytes {gen}. Wɔbɛnya bytes {rem} a aka no afiri System random number generator no mu.
wallets.add_lightning_explain: Sɛ wode bɛyɛ nsesaeɛ a ɛyɛ ntɛm a
wallets.add_lndhub_error: Node address a wɔde maa no yɛ LNDhub node a nyɛ papa.
wallets.add_placeholder: me sika kotokuo a edi kan
wallets.clipboard_bitcoin: Wowɔ Bitcoin address wɔ wo clipboard so. Wopɛ sɛ wode yɛ nsesaeɛ anaa?
wallets.clipboard_lightning: Wowɔ Lightning ka krataa wɔ wo clipboard so. Wopɛ sɛ wode yɛ nsesaeɛ anaa?
wallets.clear_clipboard_on_import: Yi clipboard mu firi hɔ wɔ import bere
wallets.details_del_wb_err: Sika a aka dodoɔ a wɔde maa no ne saa sika kotokuo yi mu sika a aka no nhyia. Yɛsrɛ wo, sɔ hwɛ bio.
wallets.details_del_wb_q: Saa sika kotokuo yi wɔ sika. Ansa na wobɛkɔ wʼanim no, yɛsrɛ wo hu sɛ worentumi nsan nnya sika no a saa sika kotokuo yi aba nsɛmfua no nni hɔ. Sɛnea worenyi no mfomsoɔ so no, yɛsrɛ wo hyɛ wo sika kotokuo mu sika a aka a ɛyɛ satoshi {balance}.
wallets.details_use_with_hardware_wallet: Fa Hardware Sika Kotokuo Di Dwuma
wallets.import_passphrase_message: Hyɛ ahintasɛm sɛ wode bi adi dwuma a
wallets.import_error: Wɔantumi amfa amma mu. Yɛsrɛ wo, hwɛ hu sɛ nsɛm a wɔde maa no yɛ papa.
wallets.import_explanation: Yɛsrɛ wo hyɛ wo aba nsɛmfua, badwam safoa, WIF, anaa biribiara a wowɔ. BlueWallet bɛbɔ mmɔden ahunu su pa no na de wo sika kotokuo aba mu.
wallets.import_scan_qr: Scan anaa fa file ba mu
wallets.import_success: Wɔde wo sika kotokuo aba mu yie.
wallets.import_success_watchonly: Wɔde wo sika kotokuo aba mu yie. KƆKƆBƆ: Yei yɛ watch-only sika kotokuo, WORENTUMI nyi sika mfiri mu.
wallets.import_discovery_derivation: Fa wʼankasa derivation path di dwuma
wallets.import_discovery_offline: BlueWallet wɔ offline mode mu seesei. Wɔ saa mode yi mu no, ɛntumi nhwɛ hu sɛ sika kotokuo no wɔ hɔ, enti ɛsɛ sɛ wʼankasa paw deɛ ɛyɛ papa no
wallets.import_derivation_subtitle: Hyɛ wʼankasa derivation path, na yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden ahwehwɛ wo sika kotokuo no.
wallets.list_create_a_wallet_text:
Ɛyɛ kwa, na wobetumi ayɛ 
dodoɔ biara a wopɛ.
wallets.list_empty_txs1: Wo nsesaeɛ bɛda adi wɔ ha.
wallets.list_empty_txs1_lightning: Ɛsɛ sɛ wode Lightning sika kotokuo yɛ wo da biara nsesaeɛ. Ka no yɛ fo na ne ho yɛ hare yie.
wallets.list_empty_txs2: Fa wo sika kotokuo no firi ase.
wallets.list_empty_txs2_lightning: Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wode di dwuma a, mia Hwɛ Sika no so na hyɛ wo sika a aka no ma.
wallets.no_ln_wallet_error: Ansa na wobɛtua Lightning ka krataa ho ka no, ɛsɛ sɛ wodi kan de Lightning sika kotokuo ka ho.
wallets.looks_like_bip38: Yei te sɛ kokoam safoa a password bɔ ho ban (BIP38).
wallets.please_continue_scanning: Yɛsrɛ wo, toa scan no so.
wallets.select_no_bitcoin: Bitcoin sika kotokuo biara nni hɔ seesei.
wallets.select_no_bitcoin_exp: Wɔhia Bitcoin sika kotokuo ansa na wɔatumi ahyɛ Lightning sika kotokuo ma. Yɛsrɛ wo yɛ bi anaa fa bi ba mu.
wallets.warning_do_not_disclose: Nkyɛ nsɛm a ɛwɔ ase ha no da
wallets.scan_import: Scan saa QR koodu yi na fa wo sika kotokuo ba application foforɔ mu.
wallets.write_down: Twerɛ saa nsɛmfua yi to hɔ na kora no yie. Fa san nya wo sika kotokuo no akyire.
wallets.wallet_type_this: Saa sika kotokuo yi su yɛ {type}.
wallets.copy_ln_url: Kopi na kora saa URL yi yie sɛnea wode bɛsan anya wo sika kotokuo no akyire.
wallets.copy_ln_public: Kopi na kora saa nsɛm yi yie sɛnea wode bɛsan anya wo sika kotokuo no akyire.
wallets.add_ln_wallet_first: Ɛsɛ sɛ wodi kan de Lightning sika kotokuo ka ho.
wallets.manage_wallets_search_placeholder: Hwehwɛ sika kotokuo, address, nsesaeɛ ne nkaeɛ mu
wallets.details_delete_wallet_error_message: Ɔhaw bi baa ho a wɔresi so dua sɛ wɔayi saa sika kotokuo yi afiri amaneɛbɔ mu—ebia ɛyɛ network ɔhaw anaa nkitahodie a ɛnyɛ den nti. Sɛ wotoa so a, ebia wobɛkɔ so anya amaneɛbɔ a ɛfa nsesaeɛ a ɛfa saa sika kotokuo yi ho, mpo wɔapepa no akyi.

total_balance_view.title: Sika a Aka Nyinaa
total_balance_view.explanation: Hwɛ sika a aka wɔ wo sika kotokuo nyinaa mu wɔ overview screen no so.

multisig.multisig_vault_explain: Banbɔ a ɛyɛ pa ma sika a ɛdɔɔso
multisig.provide_signature_details: Fa wo afidie ne sika kotokuo a safoa no wɔ so no hyɛ saa nsesaeɛ yi nsa ase
multisig.provide_signature_details_bluewallet: Wɔ BlueWallet mu no, kɔ Soma screen menu no so na paw
multisig.provide_signature_next_steps: Scan anaa Fa Nsesaeɛ a Wɔahyɛ Ne Nsa Ase Ba Mu
multisig.provide_signature_next_steps_details: Sɛ wo sika kotokuo hyɛ nsesaeɛ no nsa ase yie wie a, scan QR koodu a wɔde maa no anaa fa file a ɛka ho no ba mu, na afei hwɛ nsesaeɛ no ho nsɛm nyinaa ansa na woabɔ ho dawuro.
multisig.required_keys_out_of_total: Safoa a wɔhia firi ne nyinaa mu
multisig.shared_key_detected_question: Wɔde co-signer bi kyɛɛ wo, wopɛ sɛ wode ba mu anaa?
multisig.how_many_signatures_can_bluewallet_make: nsa ase dodoɔ sɛn na BlueWallet betumi ahyɛ
multisig.scan_or_import_file: Scan anaa fa file ba mu
multisig.cosign_this_transaction: Hyɛ saa nsesaeɛ yi nsa ase ka ho anaa?
multisig.what_is_vault_description_to_spend:
sɛnea wobɛsɛe na deɛ ɛtɔ so mmiɛnsa no wobetumi 
de ayɛ backup.
multisig.invalid_mnemonics: Ɛyɛ sɛ saa nkaeɛ nsɛmfua yi nyɛ papa.
multisig.not_a_multisignature_xpub: Yei nyɛ XPUB a ɛfiri multisignature sika kotokuo mu!
multisig.invalid_cosigner_format: Co-signer a nyɛ papa: Yei nyɛ co-signer a ɛfa {format} format ho.
multisig.i_have_mnemonics: Mewɔ aba ma saa safoa yi.
multisig.type_your_mnemonics: Hyɛ aba na fa wo Sika Korabea safoa a ɛwɔ hɔ dada no ba mu.
multisig.this_is_cosigners_xpub: Yei ne co-signer no XPUB—ayɛ krado sɛ wɔde bɛba sika kotokuo foforɔ mu. Ɛho yɛ dwoodwoo sɛ wobɛkyɛ.
multisig.this_is_cosigners_xpub_airdrop: Sɛ wonam AirDrop so kyɛ a, ɛsɛ sɛ wɔn a wɔgye no wɔ coordination screen no so.
multisig.wallet_key_created: Wɔayɛ wo Sika Korabea safoa. Gye bere kakra yɛ wo nkaeɛ aba no backup yie.
multisig.are_you_sure_seed_will_be_lost: So ampa? Wo nkaeɛ aba no bɛyera sɛ wonni backup a.
multisig.forget_this_seed: Werɛ saa aba yi na fa XPUB no di dwuma mmom.
multisig.this_cosigner_is_already_imported: Wɔde saa co-signer yi aba mu dada.
multisig.export_signed_psbt: Fa PSBT a Wɔahyɛ Ne Nsa Ase Adi
multisig.input_fp_explain: Twa mu na fa deɛ wɔde di dwuma daa (00000000)
multisig.input_path_explain: Twa mu na fa deɛ wɔde di dwuma daa ({default})
multisig.ms_help_title: Sɛnea Multisig Sika Korabea Yɛ Adwuma: Afotusɛm ne Akwan
multisig.ms_help_text: Sika kotokuo a ɛwɔ safoa pii, ma banbɔ a ɛkɔ soro anaa ɔhwɛ a wɔbom yɛ
multisig.ms_help_title1: Wɔkamfo kyerɛ sɛ wɔfa afidie pii.
multisig.ms_help_1: Sika Korabea no ne BlueWallet app afoforɔ ne sika kotokuo a wɔne PSBT hyia, te sɛ Electrum, Specter, Coldcard, Cobo Vault, ne afoforɔ bɛyɛ adwuma.
multisig.ms_help_2: Wobetumi ayɛ Sika Korabea safoa nyinaa wɔ saa afidie yi so na woayi anaa woasesa akyire yi. Sɛ safoa nyinaa wɔ afidie korɔ no ara so a, ne banbɔ ne Bitcoin sika kotokuo a ɛyɛ daa no banbɔ yɛ pɛ.
multisig.ms_help_3: Wɔ sika kotokuo akwan no so no, wobɛhunu wo Sika Korabea backup ne watch-only backup. Saa backup yi te sɛ asase mfonini a ɛkyerɛ wo sika kotokuo no. Ɛho hia ma sika kotokuo nsangyeɛ sɛ ɛba sɛ wo aba no mu baako yera a.
multisig.ms_help_title4: Sika Korabea a Wɔde Ba Mu
multisig.ms_help_4: Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wode multisig ba mu a, fa wo backup file ne Import adeyɛ no di dwuma. Sɛ aba ne XPUB nko ara na wowɔ a, wobetumi de Import bɔtɔn no a ɛyɛ baako baako adi dwuma bere a worebɔ Sika Korabea safoa no.
multisig.ms_help_5: Sɛ wonsesa hwee a, BlueWallet bɛyɛ 2-wɔ-3 Sika Korabea. Sɛ wopɛ sɛ woyɛ quorum soronko anaa wosesa address su no, ma Advanced Mode kwan wɔ Nhyehyɛeɛ no mu.

is_it_my_address.title: So ɛyɛ me address?
is_it_my_address.no_wallet_owns_address: Sika kotokuo a ɛwɔ hɔ no mu biara nni address a wɔde maa no.

autofill_word.title: Aba nsɛmfua a etwa toɔ
autofill_word.enter: Hyɛ wo nkaeɛ nsɛmfua a ɛnnwiei no
autofill_word.generate_word: Yɛ nsɛmfua a etwa toɔ no
autofill_word.error: Deɛ wode hyɛ mu no nyɛ nkaeɛ nsɛmfua a ɛyɛ nsɛmfua 11 anaa 23 a ɛnnwiei. Yɛsrɛ wo, sɔ hwɛ bio.

cc.empty: Saa sika kotokuo yi nni sika biara seesei.
cc.tip: Saa adeyɛ yi ma wo kwan sɛ wobɛhwɛ, ato din, akyekyere anaa woapaw sika sɛnea wobɛhwɛ sika kotokuo so yie. Wobetumi apaw sika pii denam kanea ahosuo akontaa no a wobɛmia so.

addresses.sensitive_private_key: Kɔkɔbɔ: kokoam safoa ho yɛ na paa. Toa so anaa?
addresses.sign_help: Wɔ ha no, wobetumi ayɛ anaa woasi nsa ase a wɔde cryptographic ayɛ a ɛgyina Bitcoin address bi so dua.
